title: abutilon deflexum
intro: Abutilon deflexum, also known as the desert holly or Mexican thistle, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Its leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to alleviate symptoms of various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Abutilon deflexum is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
